headline: Regeneron (REGN) Secures FDA Priority Review And EMA Acceptance For Cemdisiran
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NasdaqGS:REGN) received FDA acceptance with Priority Review for cemdisiran in generalized myasthenia gravis. The EMA has also accepted the marketing application for cemdisiran, aligning regulatory review on both sides of the Atlantic. Phase 3 trial data for cemdisiran were published in The Lancet, providing peer reviewed clinical evidence for the therapy. Regeneron Pharmaceuticals comes into this news with its stock at $654.27 and a mixed recent track record,...

headline: Regeneron (REGN) Stock Looks Undervalued Even After A 20% Gain
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals stock has gained 20.2% over the past year, yet its current valuation checks still lean toward the shares looking inexpensive rather than stretched. Over the last 12 months, Regeneron Pharmaceuticals has returned 20.2%, which puts recent investors in profit while raising the question of how much value is left on the table. Regulatory momentum around treatments such as cemdisiran and progress in areas like weight loss can support growth expectations. The risk is that...
